title: Language selector for AI-generated comments in Catalog Explorer
body: You can now change the default language for AI-generated comments in Catalog Explorer. Your selection is saved in your browser's local storage and applies to all subsequent AI-generated comment requests across all supported entity types. See [Change the default language for AI-generated comments](/aws/en/comments/ai-comments#change-the-default-language-for-ai-generated-comments).

ref_links.text: Change the default language for AI-generated comments
